conclusion.evidence: Two independent server-side ValidationException rejections of OpenQASM3 'delay[Nus]' instruction, both outside and inside verbatim mode. delay is NOT in supportedOperations list. Native gate set (GPI, GPI2, ZZ) contains no idle-time primitive.
conclusion.implication_for_v2: ABORT — methodology fix as specified (verbatim + delay[Nus]) is not executable on Forte 1 via AWS Braket. Falling back to rx(2*pi)*N surrogate would repeat the v1 mistake (likely virtual frame change, no real wait). No live $ spend in v2.
